message: ci: add release attestations and pin action versions

files.patch:
@@ -74,7 +74,7 @@ jobs:
             ext: ".exe"
             archive_ext: zip
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v5.0.1
       - name: Checkout external dependencies
         shell: bash
         run: |
@@ -88,7 +88,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
         with:
           targets: ${{ matrix.target }}
-      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2.8.1
         with:
           key: release-${{ matrix.target }}
 
@@ -124,7 +124,7 @@ jobs:
             "$hash  $asset" | Out-File -Encoding ASCII "dist/$asset.sha256"
           }
 
-      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4.6.2
         with:
           name: cli-and-host-${{ matrix.asset_suffix }}
           path: dist/*
@@ -159,7 +159,7 @@ jobs:
             target: aarch64-pc-windows-msvc
             suffix: windows-arm64
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v5.0.1
       - name: Checkout external dependencies
         shell: bash
         run: |
@@ -173,7 +173,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
         with:
           targets: ${{ matrix.target }}
-      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2.8.1
         with:
           key: connectors-${{ matrix.target }}
 
@@ -212,7 +212,7 @@ jobs:
             cd ..
           }
 
-      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4.6.2
         with:
           name: connectors-${{ matrix.suffix }}
           path: dist/*
@@ -227,12 +227,13 @@ jobs:
     permissions:
       contents: write
       id-token: write
+      attestations: write
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v5.0.1
         with:
           fetch-depth: 0
 
-      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v4.3.0
         with:
           path: dist
           merge-multiple: true
@@ -254,10 +255,18 @@ jobs:
           # source of truth.
           cat *.sha256 | sort > SHA256SUMS.txt
 
+      - name: Generate GitHub build provenance attestations
+        uses: actions/attest-build-provenance@v4.1.0
+        with:
+          subject-path: |
+            dist/*.tar.xz
+            dist/*.zip
+            dist/SHA256SUMS.txt
+
       - name: Install Cosign
-        uses: sigstore/cosign-installer@v4.0.0
+        uses: sigstore/cosign-installer@v4.1.1
         with:
-          cosign-release: v3.0.3
+          cosign-release: v3.0.5
 
       - name: Sign release artifacts
         env:
@@ -269,7 +278,7 @@ jobs:
             cosign sign-blob "$artifact" --bundle "${artifact}.sigstore.json" --yes
           done
 
-      - uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
+      - uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2.5.0
         with:
           name: v${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
           tag_name: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && format('v{0}', inputs.version) || github.ref_name }}
@@ -288,13 +297,17 @@ jobs:
             | macOS (ARM64) | [fwc](fwc-darwin-arm64.tar.xz) | [fcp-host](fcp-host-darwin-arm64.tar.xz) | [anthropic](fcp-anthropic-darwin-arm64.tar.xz) | [discord](fcp-discord-darwin-arm64.tar.xz) | [openai](fcp-openai-darwin-arm64.tar.xz) | [telegram](fcp-telegram-darwin-arm64.tar.xz) |
             | macOS (x64) | [fwc](fwc-darwin-amd64.tar.xz) | [fcp-host](fcp-host-darwin-amd64.tar.xz) | [anthropic](fcp-anthropic-darwin-amd64.tar.xz) | [discord](fcp-discord-darwin-amd64.tar.xz) | [openai](fcp-openai-darwin-amd64.tar.xz) | [telegram](fcp-telegram-darwin-amd64.tar.xz) |
             | Windows (x64) | [fwc](fwc-windows-amd64.zip) | [fcp-host](fcp-host-windows-amd64.zip) | [anthropic](fcp-anthropic-windows-amd64.zip) | [discord](fcp-discord-windows-amd64.zip) | [openai](fcp-openai-windows-amd64.zip) | [telegram](fcp-telegram-windows-amd64.zip) |
+            | Windows (ARM64) | [fwc](fwc-windows-arm64.zip) | [fcp-host](fcp-host-windows-arm64.zip) | [anthropic](fcp-anthropic-windows-arm64.zip) | [discord](fcp-discord-windows-arm64.zip) | [openai](fcp-openai-windows-arm64.zip) | [telegram](fcp-telegram-windows-arm64.zip) |
 
             ### Verification
 
             ```bash
             # Download and verify checksums
             curl -LO https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/releases/download/v${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}/SHA256SUMS.txt
             sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS.txt --ignore-missing
+
+            # Verify GitHub build provenance for an artifact
+            gh attestation verify fwc-linux-amd64.tar.xz -R ${{ github.repository }}
             ```
 
             Every archive and checksum manifest also ships with a Sigstore keyless
@@ -312,7 +325,7 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v5.0.1
       - name: Checkout external dependencies
         shell: bash
         run: |
